title: Micron MU Stock Dives as Semiconductor Caution Returns After Trump-Xi Summit
text: Micron Technology experienced a significant stock price decline following what had been a strong performance period. The pullback reflects broader investor concerns about semiconductor sector valuations and uncertainty surrounding global supply chains. The timing coincides with the Trump-Xi Summit, which appears to have triggered a reassessment of risk in the technology sector. Investors are becoming more cautious about semiconductor stocks after their recent gains, suggesting concerns about both current pricing levels and geopolitical factors that could impact the industry's operations and trade dynamics. The headline emphasizes the shift from bullish momentum to defensive positioning, indicating that market sentiment regarding semiconductor companies like Micron has turned more cautious amid these macroeconomic and political developments.
